title: Advanced React: Scaling and State Mastery
summary: You’ve built React apps for Audidex and Truffaire’s platforms. It’s time to dive deeper into state management, scalability, and performance tuning to craft impeccable UIs that delight users and stand up to rapid growth.
personalizationNote: Builds on your React projects and web development skills for production-grade UI.
learningObjectives: Implement Context API and Redux for complex state needs
Optimize React rendering behavior and code splitting
Apply advanced hooks and lifecycle methods effectively
knowledgeChecks: When should you prefer Context API over Redux?
Name React features to reduce unnecessary re-renders.
Explain how a custom hook improves code reuse in complex projects.
narrationScript:
State Management: Beyond Basics
You’ve handled React state locally; now tackle scaling with Redux or Context API. Managing global state smoothly means your UI won’t break under pressure as features multiply at Truffaire. Knowing when to lift state or centralize it keeps your architecture clean and maintainable.

Performance Tuning React Apps
Your audio detection app shows how slow UI kills user trust. Profiling React helps spot slow components. Memoization and lazy loading reduce re-renders and bundle size. These tweaks keep Truffaire’s products snappy even as complexity grows.

Advanced Hooks and Side Effects
Custom hooks encapsulate logic you reuse. Cleaning up side effects avoids bugs in asynchronous calls. Integrating third-party tools like libraries for face recognition or audio processing into React through hooks can make your UI smarter and your code cleaner at Truffaire.
